# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

Wireframes: https://www.figma.com/design/4Jw8te9DVzKQbb6GovyCK2/Wireframes?node-id=598-6708&t=rIzE0lj8zyusY4WJ-11

- Changes in wireframes recommended - 22nd May
    1. The filter should be with the context of list of mutual funds, not with the whole page. Summary will remain constant.
    2. Not sure if we should still give the bifurcation of CAMS/KFin on the portfolio screen. 
        1. Pros: 
            1. For an educated user, when he understands that a particular fund from CAMS is missing he can just fetch that. 
        2. Cons:
            1. Most users won’t have context on CAMS and KFin
    3. If refresh is made mandatory from both CAMS and KFin. Discussion with Nishant, the ability to fetch only a single RTA can be enabled for MFDs only. For B2C customers, refresh will refresh both RTAs. 
    Use case that MFDs have, if refresh always generates multiple OTPs, they will have to ask users for OTPs multiple times
    4. Use case of: CAMS from one number, KFin from another number. Update number nudge. Discussion with Swara: There is a significant use case, they get 3-4 customer daily for which they have to get this done. Use case of NFT APIs
    5. Gamification nudge that can be given, “Good choice: You investments will grow to be 1.2x in given time frame.” Redemption regret nudge.
    6. Understanding of interest rates and other charges, as users feel that this is the last step. 
    7. Give a property through which user can change the PAN and mobile number entered. 
- Discussion with Sharad - 24th June
    
    [Discussion with Sharad - 24th June](Unlock%20credit%20limit%20revamp/Discussion%20with%20Sharad%20-%2024th%20June%20109d4e8a1f7849aaaa76e2e8a33367d0.md)
    
-
